items.title: Free GPU for an open model
items.scenario: You want to try a small open-source LLM but have no local GPU.
items.explanation: Switch the Colab runtime to GPU and run inference in the cloud at no cost (within quota).

items.title: Persisting outputs to Drive
items.scenario: You generate embeddings that must survive the session ending.
items.explanation: Mount Google Drive and write results there, since the VM's local disk is wiped on disconnect.

items.title: Keeping API keys out of the notebook
items.scenario: You call a paid model API and don't want the key in shared cells.
items.explanation: Store it in Colab Secrets and read it at runtime, so the key isn't saved into the notebook.

items.title: Sharing a runnable demo
items.scenario: You want a teammate to reproduce your prototype instantly.
items.explanation: Share the Colab link like a Google Doc; they open and run it with no setup.
